## Checklist

- [ ] Added to the correct section
- [ ] Follows the format: `- [Name](link) — one-line reason it's worth someone's time.`
- [ ] Free, or has a genuinely useful free tier
- [ ] Link works and the resource is currently maintained
- [ ] Not a duplicate (I searched the list)
- [ ] No affiliate/referral links
